threads: kafka cluster migration from MSK to self-hosted Strimzi on EKS
PostgreSQL major version upgrade from 14 to 16
frontend bundle size optimization (target sub-500KB initial load)
deprecating legacy v1 REST API endpoints
cost allocation tagging across all AWS resources
IAM role refactor to use SSO instead of access keys
feature flag system migration to LaunchDarkly
on-call rotation overhaul — moving from PagerDuty to Opsgenie

messages.content: Ten parallel tracks for Q2 platform work — Kafka migration, PG upgrade, bundle size, feature store, v1 API deprecation, distributed tracing, cost tagging, IAM/SSO, feature flags, and on-call rotation. Status on each.
Kafka migration kicking off. Source?
Source is arn:aws:kafka:us-east-1:492372116065:cluster/msk-prod/abc-123. Target is Strimzi 0.39.0 on EKS in namespace kafka-prod.
PG14 to PG16 — when?
Maintenance window 2026-05-25 03:00 UTC. Upgrading 14.10 to 16.2 on molt-prod-rds.cluster-xyz.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com.
Bundle size status?
Current size 847KB, target 500KB. Tree-shaking and lazy-loading in progress.
Feast registry?
Registry at s3://moltai-feast-registry-prod. Online store at feast-online.cache.amazonaws.com:6379. Offline store at s3://moltai-feast-offline-prod.
v1 API sunset?
2026-09-01 sunset date for 34 deprecated endpoints. Customers notified via email.
OTel collector endpoint?
otel-collector.observability:4317. Jaeger query UI at https://jaeger.moltaicorp.com.
Cost tag namespace?
Tags use moltai: prefix. Required tags: environment,service,owner,cost-center. Dashboard at https://grafana.moltaicorp.com/d/cost-allocation.
SSO URL?
https://moltaicorp.awsapps.com/start. Permission set DeveloperAccess-Prod. Okta app id okta-app-0oa3xyz123.
LaunchDarkly project?
Project key moltai-prod. SDK key in env LAUNCHDARKLY_SDK_KEY. 156 flags migrated from legacy system.
Opsgenie integration key?
og-int-key-2026-05. Team id team-sre-prod. PagerDuty EOL is 2026-07-01.
MSK shutdown date?
MSK EOL is 2026-08-15. Strimzi chart version 0.39.0 deployed in namespace kafka-prod.
Backup plan?
Snapshot before, manual rollback path documented. PG endpoint molt-prod-rds.cluster-xyz.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com stays the same.
Biggest offender?
Lodash full import. Already replaced with selective imports — saved 80KB. Target 500KB still aspirational, currently 847KB.
First model using it?
Recommendation model. Registry s3://moltai-feast-registry-prod, online endpoint feast-online.cache.amazonaws.com:6379.
Migration guide?
Published. 34 deprecated endpoints all have v2 equivalents documented. Sunset is 2026-09-01.
Service coverage?
Auth, API gateway, billing instrumented. Sending to otel-collector.observability:4317.
Compliance check?
AWS Config rule enforces required tags: environment,service,owner,cost-center. Untagged resources flagged for owner remediation.
Legacy users?
23 IAM users to be deprecated. SSO via https://moltaicorp.awsapps.com/start with DeveloperAccess-Prod replaces them.
Flag count to migrate?
156 flags total. Project key moltai-prod. Read SDK key from LAUNCHDARKLY_SDK_KEY env var.
Routing rules ported?
All routing rules ported to Opsgenie team team-sre-prod. Integration key og-int-key-2026-05 wired into Alertmanager.
